headline: Winners And Losers Of Q1: Altria (NYSE:MO) Vs The Rest Of The Beverages, Alcohol, and Tobacco Stocks
summary: Let’s dig into the relative performance of Altria (NYSE:MO) and its peers as we unravel the now-completed Q1 beverages, alcohol, and tobacco earnings season.

headline: Altria Smokes The Competition, Offering Value And A 5.9% Yield
summary: With 56 consecutive years of dividend growth and a 5.9% yield, Altria stands out as one of the top dividend stocks to own.

raw.headline: Altria Smokes The Competition, Offering Value And A 5.9% Yield

headline: 8 Dividend S&P 500 Stocks Yield Enough To Still Be Worthwhile
summary: It's getting tougher to find S&P 500 dividend stocks that make any sense anymore. Thanks to skyrocketing stock prices, the S&P 500's yield is now less than 1%. Meanwhile, the yield on Vanguard Total Bond Market ETF is up to nearly 4%.

headline: Building A $100,000 All-Weather Dividend Portfolio For May 2026
